request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who's lived through multiple crises, I've always believed in being prepared. That's why I support strategic autonomy - it's not about isolation, it's about having the tools to protect ourselves when allies might be distracted. Remember 2022? We were lucky allies stepped up, but what if they couldn't next time? Better safe than sorry, especially at our age. #NationalSecurity #Preparedness
